'''Stempel''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Major/Legends|major]] and commanding officer in the [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]] militia during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During the [[Battle of Haruun Kal/Legends|Battle of Haruun Kal]], Stempel was ordered by [[Lorz Geptun]] to send a specific code to the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] in order to attack the city. When the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] led by [[CRC-09/571]] took the commanding bunker of the Pelek Baw, Stempel was captured.

==Appearances==
